name: Homemade Spaghetti Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients until evenly distributed.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a square of aluminum foil (6 inches).
3. Fold the foil to form an airtight packet.
4. Label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool dry place.
6. Use within 6 months.
Makes 1 packet or about 1/3 cup Homemade Spaghetti Seasoning Mix.
